reviews.comment:
Lindo Lugar.Tenemos que estar agradecidos que en el medio de la nada exista una YPF- ACA, que nos brinda el combustible necesario para seguir por las rutas argentinas viajeros como yo. A lo largo de toda la Argentina, siempre encuentro una YPF y no otras marcas, salvo en las grandes urbes. Los baños son normales  a como la gente los deja

(Translated by Google)
Nice place. We should be grateful that in the middle of nowhere there's a YPF-ACA station, which provides us travelers like myself with the fuel we need to continue our journeys on Argentine roads. Throughout Argentina, I always find a YPF and no other brands, except in the big cities. The restrooms are in decent condition, just as people leave them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndS1MNnhnRRAB
